name: Sprint 2 — Customer Core Enhancement
status: ACTIVE — AWAITING HUMAN APPROVAL TO PROCEED
goal: Fix critical data-display bugs (customer list empty, add-form blank), add Label/Status classification, build Pipeline (call scheduling) system, implement Potansiyel→Müşteri merge workflow, add all-contact-histories view, and deliver Dashboard analytics charts. By end of sprint the CRM is fully usable by sales reps.
approval_gate: HUMAN MUST APPROVE before agents begin coding. After approval, Backend Agent starts first (ION-014 through ION-020, ION-022, ION-024, ION-026 backend). Frontend Agent follows once APIs are ready.

phase_1_parallel.description: Critical bug fixes — unblock the app
frontend: ION-015 — Fix customer add form blank

both: ION-026 — Dashboard stats endpoints + pipeline widget + charts

stories.title: [BACKEND] Fix: Customer list API not returning records
stories.description: Customer screen shows 0 records despite 639 customers in Neon DB. Likely cause: ProjectId filter on JWT claims. Fix query to return paginated records for authenticated user's project.
acceptance_criteria: All 639 existing records visible to ProjectAdmin
SuperAdmin sees records across all projects

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Fix: Customer add form renders blank
stories.description: Müşteri Ekle page shows no form fields. Fix React component state initialization and React Query mutation wiring.
acceptance_criteria: Form displays all required fields on load
Valid submission navigates back to list

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Add customer detail, edit, and delete pages
stories.description: Three missing screens: /customers/:id (detail), /customers/:id/edit (edit form), and delete confirmation dialog.
acceptance_criteria: Detail page shows all fields + contact history
Delete shows confirmation; removes from list

stories.title: [BACKEND] Customer Label system
stories.db_migration: ALTER TABLE Customers ADD Label integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 2; -- 0=YuksekPotansiyel,1=Potansiyel,2=Notr,3=Vasat,4=Kotu
stories.description: Add CustomerLabel enum, EF Core migration, update DTOs and commands, add ?label= filter to GET /customers.

stories.title: [BACKEND] Customer Status system
stories.db_migration: ALTER TABLE Customers ADD Status integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 1; -- 0=Musteri,1=Potansiyel,2=Demo
stories.description: Add CustomerStatus enum, EF Core migration, update DTOs and commands, add ?status= filter.

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Label and Status badges + filters on customer list
stories.description: Colored badges for Label and Status on customer list. Filter bar with dropdown chips. Filter state persisted in URL.
acceptance_criteria: Filter chips update list in real time

stories.title: [BACKEND] Potansiyel → Müşteri merge endpoint
stories.description: POST /customers/{sourceId}/merge — atomically transfers all ContactHistories and Tasks from source (Potansiyel) to target (Musteri), then soft-deletes source.
acceptance_criteria: Transaction rolls back on any error
All contact histories appear on target
Returns 409 if source is not Potansiyel

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Müşteriye Bağla merge UI
stories.description: On customer detail (Potansiyel only): Müşteriye Bağla button → searchable customer modal → confirmation dialog → merge API call → redirect to target.
acceptance_criteria: Button only visible for Potansiyel status

stories.title: [BACKEND] Contact History result field + all-histories endpoint
stories.db_migration: ALTER TABLE ContactHistories ADD ContactResult integer NULL; -- 0=Olumlu,1=Olumsuz,2=BaskaTedarikci
stories.description: Add ContactResult enum and field. New GET /contact-histories endpoint with date/type/result filters.

stories.title: [FRONTEND] All Contact Histories page
stories.description: New /contact-histories route with table (Müşteri, Tarih, Tip icon, Sonuç badge, Notlar) and collapsible filter panel (date range, type chips, result chips).

stories.title: [BACKEND] Pipeline (Arama Planlaması) CRUD
stories.db_migration: CREATE TABLE Pipelines (Id uuid PK, CustomerId uuid FK, ProjectId uuid, PlannedDate timestamptz, Notes text, Status int DEFAULT 0, CreatedAt timestamptz, UpdatedAt timestamptz, IsDeleted boolean DEFAULT false)
stories.description: Full CRUD for Pipeline table. POST /:id/contact creates ContactHistory from pipeline entry and marks Status=Tamamlandi atomically. Default GET filter: next 7 days.
acceptance_criteria: /contact sub-action creates CH and marks pipeline complete
Default filter returns next 7 days only

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Pipeline page + Pipeline Ekle button
stories.description: Customer detail gets Pipeline Ekle button. New /pipeline route: list grouped by date, Görüşme Kaydı Gir inline, edit/delete actions. Status badges: Bekliyor/Tamamlandı/İptal.
acceptance_criteria: Görüşme Kaydı Gir creates contact and marks done

stories.title: [FRONTEND+BACKEND] Dashboard — Pipeline widget + analytics charts
stories.description: Backend: GET /dashboard/stats (counts by label/status, contact history daily counts) and GET /dashboard/pipeline (next 7 days). Frontend: 4 metric cards, donut/bar/line charts, pipeline widget with inline Görüşme Kaydı Gir.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows 4 metrics with real data

db_migrations_required: ALTER TABLE Customers ADD Label integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 2
ALTER TABLE Customers ADD Status integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
ALTER TABLE ContactHistories ADD ContactResult integer NULL

risks.risk: EF Core migrations on live Neon DB may conflict with existing data
risks.mitigation: Run migrations on dev DB first. All new columns have DEFAULT values, so no data loss. Never use destructive DDL.

risks.risk: Merge operation could corrupt data if transaction is not properly handled
risks.mitigation: ION-020 uses explicit EF Core transaction with SaveChanges inside try/catch/rollback

risks.risk: Chart library choice (recharts vs chart.js) may cause bundle size issues
risks.mitigation: Use recharts (already common in React/shadcn ecosystems); tree-shake unused components

definition_of_done: npm run build passes with 0 errors
All 13 stories have passing acceptance criteria
git add -A && git commit && git push origin main completed
Dev environment verified live at ion-crm-api-development.up.railway.app
next_sprint_blocked_until: Human approves Sprint 2 completion AND Sprint 3 plan
